## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only (specs, whitepaper, guides, READMEs)
- [ ] chore — tooling, CI, repo plumbing
- [ ] refactor — behavior-preserving code change
- [ ] spec — protocol specification change (link the spec-change issue)

## Linked issues
<!-- Closes #123, refs #456 -->

## Testing
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `forge test` passes (if `contracts/` changed)
- [ ] Manual verification (describe below)

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, known caveats, follow-ups planned in a later PR. -->
